assignments.name: redacted_text
assignments.value: Elternabend am 24.07.2026 um 18:30 Uhr im Gruppenraum. Anmeldung bei [NAME_1] bis Freitag. Sommerfest folgt im August.

nodes.name: Redacted Text (from POC 1)
nodes.notes: Input is ALREADY redacted ([NAME_1] preserved verbatim). capture_date anchors relative dates (Europe/Berlin). Edit the text to test the validator (e.g. add a bad date to see it caught).

nodes.name: Claude — Suggest + Extract (AI)
nodes.notes: THE AI STEP. Receives REDACTED text only. Returns a SUGGESTED content_type + extracted fields. It ADVISES — it cannot publish and cannot set the confirmed type. Needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (or paste a key). Cheap model: claude-haiku-4-5.

nodes.name: Schema Validate (no AI)
nodes.notes: The deterministic gate on the AI's suggestion: closed taxonomy, ISO dates only, valid times, declared ambiguity. FAIL => manual path, NEVER auto-publish. This is 'LLM advises, code decides' at the extraction step.

nodes.name: Schema valid?
nodes.notes: TRUE = the suggestion is well-formed -> hand to the human review gate (POC 3). FALSE = malformed -> the manual path (admin types it). Either way NOTHING is published here.

nodes.name: → Review gate (human confirms)
nodes.notes: Valid suggestion -> the admin reviews it (POC 3). The suggestion is a DRAFT/pre-fill, not a publish.

nodes.name: → Manual path (admin types it)
nodes.notes: Invalid/unparseable -> the post is created but the admin enters the content by hand. Fail-closed: a bad AI response can never auto-publish.
